uiBuilder.label: Data Table
uiBuilder.description: A configurable record list / data grid: give it a table and a fixed query and it loads matching records over the Table API into a paginated, OOTB-style grid. Adds global + per-column query building, list/declarative actions, a configurable dropdown, custom row buttons, highlighted-value & HTML cells, zebra & conditional row highlighting, click-to-sort, group-by, column reorder/resize, wrap-text, inline editing, reference-cell links, and a right slide-in drawer with a droppable slot (drop a Dynamic Form for inline Edit / Add-new). Emits ROW_CLICK / EDIT / COPY / DELETE / ADD_NEW / LIST_ACTION / OPEN_RECORD / REFERENCE_CLICK / DROPDOWN_SELECT / CUSTOM_ACTION / INLINE_EDIT.

properties.name: variant
properties.label: Variant
properties.description: Presentation style. 'Default' is the full management list (toolbar Filter/Sort/Group chips, leading filter-icon column, per-column ⋮ menus, count badge, More-actions menu, reorder/resize, inline edit). 'View Only' is a clean read-style list (an inline search pill, plain columns + per-row Edit/Duplicate/Delete actions + footer pager) with all of that management chrome hidden.

properties.name: table
properties.label: Table
properties.description: Table to query, e.g. "task" or "incident". The Columns / Status / Sort pickers below list this table's fields (and dot-walk into reference fields).

properties.name: query
properties.label: Fixed filter
properties.description: Condition that filters which records are shown (built with the condition editor, stored as an encoded query). Global search + per-column filters are ANDed onto this at runtime. Leave blank for all records.

properties.name: orderBy
properties.label: Sort by field
properties.description: Default field to sort by. Clicking a column header (when Enable sort is on) overrides this at runtime. Use "Sort descending" to reverse the order.

properties.name: orderDescending
properties.label: Sort descending
properties.description: When on, sorts the chosen Sort field in descending order.

properties.name: fields
properties.label: Columns
properties.description: Fields to show as columns, in order. Add reference fields and dot-walk into them (e.g. caller_id.name). Leave empty to show every returned field. Stored as a comma-separated field list.

properties.name: labels
properties.label: Column headers (override)
properties.description: Optional comma-separated header labels matching the Columns order, e.g. "Product Name,Version,Status". Blank entries fall back to the field's prettified name.

properties.name: pageSize
properties.label: Rows per page
properties.description: Default number of rows fetched and shown per page. Pages load lazily from the server on demand (sysparm_limit + sysparm_offset). Users can change this at runtime via the per-page selector.

properties.name: showPageSizeControl
properties.label: Show per-page selector
properties.description: When on, the footer shows a 'Per page' dropdown so the user can change how many rows are shown per page.

properties.name: pageSizes
properties.label: Per-page options
properties.description: Comma-separated page-size choices offered in the per-page selector, e.g. "5,10,20,50,100".

properties.name: pageSizeLabel
properties.label: Per-page label
properties.description: Label shown next to the per-page selector.

properties.name: heading
properties.label: Heading
properties.description: Optional title shown in the toolbar above the table. Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: showCount
properties.label: Show record-count badge
properties.description: When on (and a Heading is set), a badge next to the title shows the total record count (like the native record list).

properties.name: showLastRefreshed
properties.label: Show "Last refreshed" subtitle
properties.description: When on (and a Heading is set), a subtitle under the title shows how long ago the list was last loaded; it updates on Refresh.

properties.name: showMoreActions
properties.label: Show More-actions menu
properties.description: When on, a '⋮' overflow menu in the toolbar offers the standard list actions (Refresh, Reset, Export) plus any configured Dropdown items, like the native record-list header.

properties.name: showColumnMenu
properties.label: Show column actions menu
properties.description: When on, hovering a column header reveals a '⋮' actions button with sort / filter / group-by for that column, plus filter/group state icons in the header.

properties.name: itemLabel
properties.label: Item label
properties.description: Noun used in the footer count, e.g. "products" → "Showing 1-5 of 5 products".

properties.name: emptyMessage
properties.label: Empty message
properties.description: Text shown when no records match the query.

properties.name: showActions
properties.label: Show actions column
properties.description: When on, shows the per-row action icons column (Edit / Duplicate / Delete + any custom buttons).

properties.name: showEdit
properties.label: Show Edit action
properties.description: Show the edit (pencil) action icon. When the drawer is enabled, Edit also opens the right drawer.

properties.name: showCopy
properties.label: Show Duplicate action
properties.description: Show the duplicate (copy) action icon.

properties.name: showDelete
properties.label: Show Delete action
properties.description: Show the delete (trash) action icon. Delete is a BUILT-IN action: it asks for confirmation, then deletes the record over the Table API and refreshes — no event wiring needed.

properties.name: actionsLabel
properties.label: Actions header
properties.description: Header text for the actions column.

properties.name: editIcon
properties.label: Edit icon
properties.description: Icon for the edit action. Uses the native ServiceNow icon picker (search + Outline / Fill tabs).

properties.name: copyIcon
properties.label: Duplicate icon
properties.description: Icon for the duplicate action. Uses the native ServiceNow icon picker (search + Outline / Fill tabs).

properties.name: deleteIcon
properties.label: Delete icon
properties.description: Icon for the delete action. Uses the native ServiceNow icon picker (search + Outline / Fill tabs).

properties.name: actionColumnPosition
properties.label: Action column position
properties.description: Where the per-row action column sits: Left, Right, or Sticky (pinned to the right edge while the grid scrolls horizontally).

properties.name: customButtons
properties.label: Custom row buttons (JSON)
properties.description: Extra icon buttons added to the action column, as a JSON array, e.g. [{"id":"approve","label":"Approve","icon":"check-outline"}]. Clicking one fires CUSTOM_ACTION { actionId, sysId, table }.

properties.name: showGlobalSearch
properties.label: Show global search
properties.description: When on, a search box appears top-right. It runs a full-text search across the table's indexed columns (ANDed with the fixed filter). Applies on Enter / blur.

properties.name: globalSearchPlaceholder
properties.label: Search placeholder
properties.description: Placeholder text for the global search box.

properties.name: showColumnFilters
properties.label: Column filters open by default
properties.description: Initial state of the per-column filter row (the user can show/hide it any time with the toolbar Filter chip). The filter row builds a query per column (operator: is / is not / contains / starts with / ends with / in / not in / greater / less / empty / not empty).

properties.name: showFilterToggle
properties.label: Show Filter chip
properties.description: When on, a Filter chip in the toolbar shows/hides the per-column filter row client-side (no refetch) and shows the active condition count.

properties.name: showFilterIcon
properties.label: Show filter toggle icon
properties.description: When on, a small filter (funnel) icon sits in a leading column at the top-left of the grid (like the native list). Clicking it shows/hides the per-column filter row. No selection checkbox is added.

properties.name: showQuery
properties.label: Show query bar
properties.description: When on, a read-only bar shows the effective encoded query (fixed filter + search + column filters + sort/group) currently sent to the server.

properties.name: showRefresh
properties.label: Show Refresh button
properties.description: When on, a refresh icon in the toolbar reloads the current page from the server.

properties.name: showReset
properties.label: Show Reset button
properties.description: When on, a Reset button clears the global search, column filters, sort and group-by (back to the configured defaults).

properties.name: showExport
properties.label: Show Export button
properties.description: When on, an Export button fires the EXPORT event with the table and the current encoded query, so the page can run a server export (the button itself does not download).

properties.name: showListActions
properties.label: Show list actions
properties.description: When on, render the table's active list-banner UI Actions (sys_ui_action, list context) as toolbar buttons. Clicking one fires LIST_ACTION so the page can react/navigate — the action's own script is not executed.

properties.name: showDropdown
properties.label: Show dropdown menu
properties.description: When on, a dropdown menu appears in the toolbar. It is empty unless you configure 'Dropdown items'. Selecting an item fires DROPDOWN_SELECT { id, label }.

properties.name: dropdownPlaceholder
properties.label: Dropdown placeholder
properties.description: Trigger text for the dropdown menu when nothing is selected.

properties.name: dropdownItems
properties.label: Dropdown items (JSON)
properties.description: Menu items as a JSON array, e.g. [{"id":"export","label":"Export"},{"id":"refresh","label":"Refresh"}]. Leave blank for an empty menu.

properties.name: showAddNew
properties.label: Show Add-new button
properties.description: When on (and the drawer is enabled), an 'Add new' button appears top-right. It opens the drawer and fires ADD_NEW { table, sysId: "-1" } — bind a dropped form's Record sys_id to it to render a blank create form.

properties.name: addNewLabel
properties.label: Add-new label
properties.description: Label for the Add-new button.

properties.name: enableDrawer
properties.label: Enable side drawer
properties.description: When on, a right slide-in drawer is available. It exposes a droppable 'form' slot — drop a Dynamic Form (or any component) into it in UI Builder. Edit / Add-new / Open-record (side) open the drawer; bind the dropped form's Record sys_id to the EDIT_ACTION / ADD_NEW / OPEN_RECORD event.

properties.name: drawerTitle
properties.label: Drawer title
properties.description: Heading shown at the top of the side drawer.

properties.name: drawerWidth
properties.label: Drawer width
properties.description: Initial CSS width of the side drawer, e.g. 480px or 40vw. Users can drag the drawer's left edge to resize it at runtime.

properties.name: rowClickAction
properties.label: Row click action
properties.description: What clicking a row body does (in addition to firing ROW_CLICK): None, Expand/collapse an inline detail, or Open the record (per 'Open record in').

properties.name: openRecordIn
properties.label: Open record in
properties.description: When Row click action is 'Open record': open it in the Side drawer (drop a form there) or a New browser tab (classic form). OPEN_RECORD fires either way so the page can override navigation.

properties.name: enableReferenceLinks
properties.label: Clickable reference cells
properties.description: When on, reference-field cells become links. Clicking one fires REFERENCE_CLICK { table, sysId, field } and opens the referenced record per 'Open reference in'.

properties.name: referenceOpenIn
properties.label: Open reference in
properties.description: Where a clicked reference cell opens: the Side drawer or a New browser tab.

properties.name: highlightedValueFields
properties.label: Highlighted-value columns
properties.description: Comma-separated fields to render with now-highlighted-value (a colored chip). Use sparingly — 1 or 2 columns for best scanability. (Status-style coloring is driven by these highlighted columns; there is no separate status field.)

properties.name: wrapAtChars
properties.label: Wrap text at (characters)
properties.description: Maximum characters per line in a cell. 0 = no wrapping (single line, truncated). When greater than 0, cells wrap to the next line once the text exceeds this many characters (the column is capped at this width).

properties.name: zebra
properties.label: Alternate row shading
properties.description: When on, even rows get a subtle gray background (zebra striping).

properties.name: rowHighlightRules
properties.label: Row highlight rules (JSON)
properties.description: Conditionally highlight rows. JSON array of { field, op, value, color } evaluated on the loaded page, e.g. [{"field":"priority","op":"is","value":"1","color":"#fde8e8"}]. op: is / is not / contains / startswith / endswith / > / < / empty / notempty. First match wins.

properties.name: enableSort
properties.label: Enable sort
properties.description: When on, clicking a column header sorts by that column (toggles ascending / descending / off) and refetches.

properties.name: enableGroupBy
properties.label: Enable group-by
properties.description: When on, a 'Group by' selector appears in the footer; rows are server-sorted by the group field and grouped under headers (within the loaded page).

properties.name: groupByField
properties.label: Default group-by field
properties.description: Field to group by initially (when Enable group-by is on). Users can change it via the footer selector.

properties.name: enableReorder
properties.label: Enable column reorder
properties.description: When on, column headers can be dragged to reorder columns.

properties.name: enableResize
properties.label: Enable column resize
properties.description: When on, a drag handle on each column header's right edge resizes the column.

properties.name: enableInlineEdit
properties.label: Enable inline editing
properties.description: When on, double-clicking a (non-status, non-HTML) cell turns it into an input; committing PATCHes the record and fires INLINE_EDIT { sysId, field, value }.

actions.name: ROW_CLICK
actions.label: Row clicked
actions.description: Fired when a table row body is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

actions.name: EDIT_ACTION
actions.label: Edit clicked
actions.description: Fired when the edit (pencil) icon is clicked. Also opens the drawer when enabled. Payload: { sysId, table }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to edit.

actions.name: COPY_ACTION
actions.label: Duplicate clicked
actions.description: Fired when the duplicate (copy) icon is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to duplicate.

actions.name: DELETE_ACTION
actions.label: Delete clicked
actions.description: Fired when the delete (trash) icon is clicked. Payload: { sysId, table }.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to delete.

actions.name: ADD_NEW
actions.label: Add new clicked
actions.description: Fired when the Add-new button is clicked (also opens the drawer). Bind a dropped form's Record sys_id to sysId to render a blank create form. Payload: { table, sysId } where sysId is "-1".

payload.name: table
payload.label: Table
payload.description: Table to create a record in.

actions.name: LIST_ACTION
actions.label: List action clicked
actions.description: Fired when a toolbar list/declarative UI Action is clicked. The action's script is NOT executed — bind this to react/navigate. Payload: { name, sysId, label }.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Label
payload.description: The button label shown to the user.

actions.name: OPEN_RECORD
actions.label: Open record
actions.description: Fired when a row is clicked while Row click action is 'Open record'. Payload: { sysId, table, openIn } (openIn = side | newTab). Bind to set a form's sys_id, or to override navigation.

payload.name: sysId
payload.label: Record sys_id
payload.description: sys_id of the record to open.

actions.name: REFERENCE_CLICK
actions.label: Reference cell clicked
actions.description: Fired when a clickable reference cell is clicked. Payload: { table, sysId, field, query } — the REFERENCED record's table + sys_id, the source column, and the list's current encoded query.

payload.name: field
payload.label: Source field
payload.description: Column the reference was clicked in.

payload.name: query
payload.label: Current query
payload.description: The list's current effective encoded query.

actions.name: EXPORT
actions.label: Export clicked
actions.description: Fired when the Export button is clicked. Bind it to run a server-side export. Payload: { table, query } (query = the current encoded sysparm_query).

actions.name: DROPDOWN_SELECT
actions.label: Dropdown item selected
actions.description: Fired when a toolbar dropdown item is selected. Payload: { id, label }.

payload.name: id
payload.label: Item id
payload.description: id of the selected dropdown item.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Item label
payload.description: Label of the selected dropdown item.

actions.name: CUSTOM_ACTION
actions.label: Custom button clicked
actions.description: Fired when a configured custom row button is clicked. Payload: { actionId, sysId, table }.

actions.name: INLINE_EDIT
actions.label: Inline edit committed
actions.description: Fired when an inline-edited cell is committed (after the PATCH is requested). Payload: { sysId, field, value }.
